render_strategy.source:
{
  render: () => <Footer>
      <Footer.Top brandLogo={<Link href="#">
            <Image src={sanofiLogoInverse} alt="sanofi_logo" />
          </Link>} additionalInformation="This is a placeholder for additional informations." socialLinks={socialLinks} />
      <Footer.Bottom legalMention="This is a legal mention and copyright paragraph placeholder. Keep it short
          and concise.">
        <FooterBottomLink href="#" icon={IconName.OPEN_IN_NEW}>
          Site Map
        </FooterBottomLink>
        <FooterBottomLink href="#" icon={IconName.OPEN_IN_NEW}>
          Legal Notice
        </FooterBottomLink>
        <FooterBottomLink href="#" icon={IconName.OPEN_IN_NEW}>
          Cookies Policy
        </FooterBottomLink>
        <FooterBottomLink href="#" icon={IconName.OPEN_IN_NEW}>
          Privacy & Data Protection
        </FooterBottomLink>
        <FooterBottomLink href="#" icon={IconName.OPEN_IN_NEW}>
          Accessibility
        </FooterBottomLink>
      </Footer.Bottom>
    </Footer>
}
